creator: ady@freebsd.ady.ro
text:
>  PS: holding ^T doesn't crush neither Pine 4.00 nor Pine 3.96 (at least
>         not for me, under 2.2.6-REL and 3.0-980520-SNAP)...
>

 Whooops, I take that back ! I have tried it without defining an
externat speller, but when it comes to define without existing then Pine
*will* crush in at most 4-5 seconds... :( I believe this is a bug...

  Sorry,
  Ady (@freebsd.ady.ro)
